mapper.select: SELECT id, rule_name AS ruleName, lesson_warning_enabled AS lessonWarningEnabled, lesson_threshold AS lessonThreshold, days_warning_enabled AS daysWarningEnabled, days_threshold AS daysThreshold FROM pt_renewal_warning_rule WHERE status = 1
SELECT store_id FROM pt_renewal_warning_rule_store_rel WHERE rule_id = #{value}
SELECT coach_id FROM pt_private_appointment WHERE benefit_id = #{value} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT id FROM pt_renewal_warning_record WHERE benefit_id = #{value} AND closed_at IS NULL LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE pt_renewal_warning_record SET remaining_lessons = #{remainingLessons}, remaining_days = #{remainingDays}, warning_type = #{warningType}, coach_id = #{coachId}, last_warning_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{recordId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pt_renewal_warning_record (rule_id, member_id, benefit_id, coach_id, store_id, product_id, remaining_lessons, remaining_days, warning_type, follow_status, first_warning_at, last_warning_at) VALUES (#{ruleId}, #{memberId}, #{benefitId}, #{coachId}, #{storeId}, #{productId}, #{remainingLessons}, #{remainingDays}, #{warningType}, 0, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE pt_renewal_warning_record w SET w.closed_at = NOW() WHERE w.benefit_id = #{value} AND w.closed_at IS NULL AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM pt_member_private_benefit b WHERE b.id = w.benefit_id AND b.status = 1)
